/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/vislab_field_test.dir/base_partial.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vislab_field_test.dir/regular_field.cpp.o -o ../../../bin/vislab_field_test  ../../../lib/libvislab_field.a ../../../lib/libgtest.a ../../../lib/libgtest_main.a ../../../lib/libvislab_core.a ../../../lib/libgtest.a
